aeo_readiness.summary: AI models are likely to cite this business for localized HVAC queries due to strong NAP consistency and GBP presence, but lack of conversational content and authority signals limits broader AI visibility.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema to capture AI attention for common HVAC queries.
Expand content to include HowTo guides for HVAC maintenance and installation.

gbp_analysis.summary: GBP is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and accurate hours, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement to boost AI trust signals.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to signal active business operations.
Q&A section is inactive, missing opportunities for user engagement and keyword inclusion.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected, ensuring reliable business information across platforms.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all directories.
Regularly audit citations to prevent future inconsistencies.

schema_gaps: Missing FAQPage schema to address common customer queries.
No HowTo schema for HVAC maintenance or installation guides.
LocalBusiness schema lacks detailed service area and geo-coordinates.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational content and authority signals limits AI model citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC maintenance tips and installation guides.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage and HowTo schema to capture AI attention for common queries.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, industry partnerships, and detailed project case studies to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for conversational search and authority signals.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their GBP is strong, but AI models overlook them for maintenance and installation queries due to content gaps.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema optimization, conversational content, and authority building to make them the go-to HVAC expert for AI models.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, so acting now is crucial to capture market share.

opening_line: We analyzed your website and GBP and found significant opportunities to boost your AI-driven lead generation.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how our AEO strategy can position your business as the top HVAC authority for AI models.
